name: Allyson Mitchell

contactInfo.office: 500 N. Church St., Suite 300, Palestine, TX 75801

bio: Allyson Mitchell serves as the District Attorney for Anderson County, prosecuting felony criminal cases in the Palestine area. She is committed to ensuring public safety and justice for all residents of Anderson County.
campaignPromises: Combat the drug epidemic in rural East Texas
Support victims' rights throughout the legal process
Maintain transparency and accountability in the DA's office
Collaborate with local law enforcement to reduce crime
